Investing in the Future of the Blue Economy

Strategic capital for the ventures shaping the next era of ocean innovation. We invest in founders solving maritime and ocean challenges at scale.

Partner With Us
Thesis

Investment Thesis

A focused strategy for high-impact Blue Economy returns.

Blue Economy Focus

Exclusively investing in maritime, ocean, and Blue Economy innovation.

Global Ambition

Backing founders with the vision and capability to build globally.

Early-Stage

Pre-seed to Series A — getting in early on transformative ventures.

Sectors

What We Invest In

Three core verticals driving the Blue Economy transformation.

Maritime Technology

Smart shipping, autonomous vessels, and maritime AI.

Ocean Sustainability

Climate solutions, aquaculture tech, and marine conservation.

Logistics Innovation

Supply chain digitization and last-mile maritime logistics.

For Investors

Partner With Mursel

Access curated Blue Economy deal flow and co-investment opportunities.

Co-Invest

Join us in backing the most promising BlueTech ventures across our portfolio.

LP Opportunities

Become a limited partner and gain exposure to the full Blue Economy portfolio.

Access the Blue Economy

Connect with us to explore investment partnerships and deal flow.
